user.title: Danfoss Ally Gateway
user.description: Select the Zigbee backend used to communicate with your Danfoss Ally TRVs.

z2m.title: Zigbee2MQTT Configuration
z2m.description: Configure the Zigbee2MQTT MQTT base topic. The default is usually correct unless you changed it in Z2M settings.

zha.title: ZHA Configuration
zha.description: ZHA will be used to communicate with your Danfoss Ally TRVs via Zigbee cluster commands.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the selected backend.
error.mqtt_not_configured: The MQTT integration is not set up. Zigbee2MQTT requires MQTT.
error.zha_not_configured: The ZHA integration is not set up.

abort.zha_no_options: ZHA backend has no configurable options.

user.title: Add Room
user.description: Configure a room with Danfoss Ally TRVs. Select your TRV devices from the list. Optionally add an external temperature sensor, a heat source entity, and a remote climate entity.

data_description.trv_entities: Select the Danfoss Ally, Popp, or Hive TRV devices for this room.
data_description.area: Assign the virtual room device to a Home Assistant area.
data_description.temperature_sensor: An external temperature sensor entity to use instead of the TRV's built-in sensor. Can be any HA temperature sensor.
data_description.heat_source_type: How to determine if the heating system is active.
data_description.heat_source: The climate or binary sensor entity representing your heating system.
data_description.remote_climate: A climate entity to sync setpoints with TRVs in this room. When a TRV setpoint changes, the remote climate is updated, and vice versa.
data_description.schedule_entity: A schedule helper entity defining at-home time periods. 'On' blocks = at home, 'off' = away.
data_description.preheat_enabled: When enabled, TRVs start heating before a scheduled temperature increase to reach the target on time.

data_description.area: Assign the virtual room device to a Home Assistant area.

data_description.heat_source: The climate or binary sensor entity representing your heating system.

data_description.schedule_entity: A schedule helper entity defining at-home time periods. 'On' blocks = at home, 'off' = away.

error.no_trvs_selected: At least one TRV must be selected.
error.trv_already_assigned: One or more selected TRVs are already assigned to another room.
